title: 22 Pre-Rendered Annotation Workflow Compositions with Real S3 Data
description: 22 pre-rendered Remotion video compositions (11 solution pages + 11 case study pages) that visualize real annotation workflows using actual S3 media samples and annotation JSON data. 8 composition types grounded in real media assets. Gemini 2.5 Flash enrichment used ONLY for datasets lacking annotation data (Egocentric, Cinematic). Every composition shows a specific annotation workflow in action.

1.name: Sensor-Fusion Tracking
1.description: Video + interpolated bboxes + hand telemetry + metadata panel

2.name: Pairwise Arena
2.description: Split-screen A vs B, subtle selection highlight, uses betterVideoId/selectedAnswer/bestVideo

3.name: Multi-Gen Gallery
3.description: Grid of N generations, checkmark/X, best selection highlight, uses bestImage/selectedImages

4.name: Detection + Annotation
4.description: Progressive bboxes, labels, confidence scores, uses real bbox coordinates

5.name: Classification Pipeline
5.description: Taxonomy tree expanding root to leaf, uses real category/subcategory data

6.name: Quality Rubric
6.description: Multi-dimension scoring gauges + radar chart, uses real 5-axis rubric

7.name: Safety Shield
7.description: Scanning overlay + verdict badges, uses real policy violation data

8.name: Cinematic Showcase
8.description: Minimal overlay on 4K footage, metadata labels, licensing badge

userStories.title: Extract Shared Remotion Components from EgocentricPipeline Prototype
userStories.description: Extract reusable components from src/remotion/EgocentricPipeline.tsx into src/remotion/shared/: BoundingBox, MetadataPanel, ProgressBar, BottomBar, TerminalHeader, DesignTokens, RadarChart, TaxonomyTree, VerdictBadge. Foundation for all 8 composition types.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/remotion/shared/DesignTokens.ts with TOKENS constant: colors (accent #92B090, accentAlt #4a90d9, text #e8e8e8, muted #888, panelBg, error, warning, success, chosen, rejected, selected #92B090), fonts (mono: JetBrains Mono, sans: Geist), bbox (hand, object, face, violation, highlight, product)

Create src/remotion/shared/BoundingBox.tsx with props: bbox [number,number,number,number], label, color, sublabel?, opacity, showCorners?, confidence? -- extracted from EgocentricPipeline.tsx lines 91-165
Create src/remotion/shared/MetadataPanel.tsx with props: title, sections MetadataSection[], width? (320), visible, position? ('right'|'left') -- generalized from SidePanel
Create src/remotion/shared/ProgressBar.tsx -- animated horizontal bar using Remotion interpolate
Create src/remotion/shared/BottomBar.tsx -- CLARU-branded timestamp bar with scrub indicator
Create src/remotion/shared/TerminalHeader.tsx -- macOS-style terminal title bar
Create src/remotion/shared/RadarChart.tsx -- 5-axis radar/spider chart using SVG with animated fill for Type 6
Create src/remotion/shared/TaxonomyTree.tsx -- animated hierarchical label tree for Type 5 with levels array and activeDepth prop

Create src/remotion/shared/VerdictBadge.tsx -- animated verdict (PASS/FAIL/CHOSEN/REJECTED/WINNER/BLOCKED) with variant: label|border-glow|badge and animationStyle: fade|glow -- NO crowns, trophies, or flashy animations
All shared components import from DesignTokens.ts, export prop interfaces
EgocentricPipeline.tsx continues to work unchanged
TypeScript strict mode passes

userStories.title: Create Composition Manifest and Root.tsx Registry
userStories.description: Create scripts/composition-manifest.json mapping all 22 compositions to type (1-8), S3 datasets, annotation source (real|gemini|metadata-only), and render settings. Update Root.tsx to register all.
acceptanceCriteria: Create scripts/composition-manifest.json with 22 entries: id, type (1-8), page ({route, placement}), samples ({datasetId, datasetSlug, sampleId?, subcategory?}), annotationSource ('real'|'gemini'|'metadata-only'), enrichment (config or null), render ({durationFrames, fps:30, width:1280, height:720, codec:'h264'})
Solution IDs: sol-egocentric, sol-vla, sol-manipulation, sol-teleop, sol-video-gen, sol-rlhf, sol-red-teaming, sol-sim2real, sol-open-vs-custom, sol-crowd-vs-expert, sol-eu-ai-act
Case study IDs: cs-egocentric, cs-workplace, cs-fashion, cs-game-capture, cs-gen-safety, cs-red-team, cs-vid-classify, cs-vid-eval, cs-vid-quality, cs-prompt-bench, cs-object-id
Duration: Type 1=300f (10s), Type 2=360f (12s), Type 3=300f (10s), Type 4=300f (10s), Type 5=360f (12s), Type 6=360f (12s), Type 7=300f (10s), Type 8=300f (10s)
Entries with annotationSource 'real' have enrichment: null and reference s3_annotation_key
Entries with annotationSource 'gemini' have enrichment config pointing to prompt file

Update Root.tsx: TYPE_MAP maps 1->SensorFusionComposition, 2->PairwiseArenaComposition, 3->MultiGenGalleryComposition, 4->DetectionAnnotationComposition, 5->ClassificationPipelineComposition, 6->QualityRubricComposition, 7->SafetyShieldComposition, 8->CinematicShowcaseComposition
Each <Composition> passes compositionId via defaultProps
Existing EgocentricPipeline composition remains registered
npx remotion studio launches without errors

userStories.title: Create Gemini Enrichment Pipeline Script (Types 1, 8 Only)
userStories.description: Build scripts/gemini-enrich.ts for compositions where annotationSource === 'gemini'. Only needed for Type 1 (sensor-fusion, 5 compositions) and Type 8 (cinematic, 2 compositions) where no annotation JSON exists in S3.
acceptanceCriteria: Create scripts/gemini-enrich.ts runnable with tsx
Reads manifest, filters to annotationSource === 'gemini' only (7 compositions: sol-egocentric, sol-vla, sol-manipulation, sol-teleop, cs-workplace, sol-open-vs-custom, cs-egocentric)
Downloads S3 samples to tmp/samples/{id}/ (skips if cached)
Extracts frames with ffmpeg to tmp/frames/{id}/
Sends frames to Gemini 2.5 Flash with type-specific prompts
Validates against Type1AnnotationSchema or Type8AnnotationSchema
Retries once on validation failure, logs error and skips if still invalid
Writes to public/remotion-assets/annotations/{id}.json
Concurrency limit 3, 1s delay between batches, exponential backoff for rate limits
Create scripts/gemini-prompts/type-1-sensor-fusion.txt
Accepts --composition {id} flag
Requires GOOGLE_API_KEY from .env.local
Add remotion:enrich script to package.json

userStories.title: Create Real Annotation Data Extraction Script
userStories.description: Build scripts/extract-annotations.ts that downloads existing S3 annotation JSONs for compositions with annotationSource: 'real', extracts relevant fields per type, and writes formatted annotation JSON for Remotion.
acceptanceCriteria: Create scripts/extract-annotations.ts runnable with tsx
Reads manifest, filters to annotationSource === 'real' (13 compositions)
Downloads S3 annotation JSON for each composition's dataset
Type 2: extracts betterVideoId/selectedAnswer/bestVideo, prompt_text, video URLs
Type 3: extracts bestImage, selectedImages, hasGoodQuality, generations array
Type 4: extracts bbox coordinates, class labels, score confidence, captions, brandName
Type 5: extracts category, subcategory, selectedGame, concept, template categories catalog
Type 6: extracts isCinematic, hasGoodMotion, isHighQuality, isVideoInteresting, hasGoodTextAlignment, video_description
Type 7: extracts text_policy_violation, video_policy_violation, prompt text
Validates extracted data against per-type Zod schemas
Writes to public/remotion-assets/annotations/{id}.json
Accepts --composition {id} flag
Add remotion:extract script to package.json

userStories.title: Create Render Pipeline Script
userStories.description: Build scripts/render-all.ts that reads manifest and renders each composition to MP4 via Remotion CLI.
acceptanceCriteria: Create scripts/render-all.ts runnable with tsx
Reads composition-manifest.json, iterates all 22 compositions
Runs npx remotion render for each with --codec h264 --crf 23
Batches of 2 (CPU-bound concurrency)
Warns if > 10 MB, re-renders with --crf 28 if > 15 MB
Summary table: composition ID, type, duration, file size, status
Creates public/videos/ if not exists
Accepts --composition {id} and --dry-run flags
Add remotion:render and remotion:pipeline scripts to package.json
Exits non-zero if any render fails

userStories.title: Type 1: Sensor-Fusion Tracking Composition
userStories.description: Build SensorFusionComposition: video + interpolated bboxes + hand telemetry + metadata panel. Parameterized version of EgocentricPipeline.tsx prototype.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/remotion/compositions/type-1/SensorFusionComposition.tsx accepting { compositionId: string }
Loads annotation JSON and hero video from staticFile paths
Keyframe interpolation for smooth bbox tracking (same algorithm as EgocentricPipeline getAnnotationAtTime)
Uses shared BoundingBox for hand (TOKENS.bbox.hand) and object (TOKENS.bbox.object) bboxes
Uses shared MetadataPanel for sensor-fusion panel: TASK STATE, HAND TELEMETRY, OBJECT STATES, SPATIAL, IMU ESTIMATE, SCENE
Uses shared BottomBar with CLARU branding, timestamp, phase label, scrub bar
Timeline: 0-15 video only, 15-24 bboxes fade in, 24-30 panel slides in, 30-270 full composition, 270-300 fade to CLARU watermark
Create types.ts with Type1Annotation, Type1Frame, HandAnnotation, ObjectAnnotation, SpatialEstimate, IMUEstimate, SceneContext
Renders correctly at 1280x720, 30fps
TypeScript strict mode passes

userStories.title: Type 2: Pairwise Arena Composition

Two videos side by side (50/50 split) -- Video A left, Video B right
Prompt text types out at top from real annotation metadata.prompt_text
Winner from real annotation data (betterVideoId, selectedAnswer, or bestVideo)
Selected video gets subtle accent border glow (#92B090) — non-selected dims. NO crown/trophy. Feels like a research interface.
Loser gets subtle dim/desaturation
For cs-vid-eval: shows config IDs ('Config 21 vs Config 41') from metadata.key
For cs-prompt-bench: shows category label ('Kayaking') and category verification checkmark from videoBelongsToCategory
Timeline: 0-30 fade in with split divider labels, 30-60 prompt types, 60-180 play, 180-240 selection glow + dim, 240-360 hold with pulse
Uses shared BottomBar with 'Arena' label
Create types.ts with Type2Annotation: videoA, videoB, winner, promptText, configLabels?, categoryLabel?
TypeScript strict mode passes

userStories.title: Type 6: Quality Rubric Composition

Video left (60%), scoring panel right (40%)

5 gauges from real annotation data: Cinematic (not-cinematic->0.2 red), Motion (good-motion->0.8 green), Quality (not-high-quality->0.3 orange), Interest (interesting->0.7 green), Alignment (good-alignment->0.8 green)
After gauges fill, RadarChart builds 5-axis spider chart with animated fill
metadata.video_description types out beneath video
Timeline: 0-30 fade in, 30-60 first gauge, 60-90 remaining gauges stagger, 90-150 radar chart, 150-240 description types, 240-360 hold
Uses RadarChart, ProgressBar, BottomBar with 'Quality Assessment' label
Create types.ts with Type6Annotation: dimensions[{name, value:string, numericScore}], videoDescription
Documented mapping: good-*=0.8, not-*=0.2-0.3, interesting=0.7
TypeScript strict mode passes
